creator: tomek@cedro.info
text:
Hello world :-)

It seems there are two problems reported on the mailing lists [1][2] regarding /usr/home not being linked to /home that sound like an upcoming surprise on 13.0-RELEASE :-)

Best regards :-)
Tomek

[1] https://lists.freebsd.org/pipermail/freebsd-questions/2021-March/293340.html
[2] https://lists.freebsd.org/pipermail/freebsd-questions/2021-March/293612.html
